caption: The video begins with a breathtaking view of the night sky, filled with countless stars and the faint glow of the Milky Way, setting a cosmic and awe-inspiring tone. The words "THE FIBONACCI SEQUENCE" appear prominently in the center, introducing the topic. As the scene transitions, the text changes to "EVERYTHING IN THE UNIVERSE IS GOVERNED," hinting at the profound connection between the Fibonacci sequence and the natural order of the universe. The serene backdrop of the starry sky remains constant, reinforcing the idea that this mathematical concept is deeply embedded in the fabric of the cosmos. The video likely aims to explore how the Fibonacci sequence manifests in various aspects of nature and the universe, inviting viewers to appreciate its universal significance.
